name: AA Industrial Belting (Shanghai) Co.,Ltd
summary: AA Industrial Belting (Shanghai) Co., Ltd produces and sells belts in China. It offers conveyor belts, screen printing blankets, coiling wrappers, fabrication products, and timing belts for application in various industries, such as food processing, airport and logistics, textile printing, automotive and steel, tire, tobacco, and aluminum. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
